description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot of green lawn, featuring a light gray, multi-sectioned hip roof and a spacious driveway leading to a double garage. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facades. The front entrance is recessed and partially sheltered, with a curved walkway connecting the driveway to the main door. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are framed in white, providing a modern yet understated appearance. The rear of the bungalow features additional large windows, likely for living spaces that open to the backyard. The overall design is low and horizontal, emphasizing accessibility and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a light gray hip roof, double garage, and large asymmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a wide driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with a curved walkway, and large windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back windows and the extended sections of the bungalow, with the driveway visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long, horizontal layout, multiple large windows, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, side windows, and the driveway curving toward the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
